motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def maximumEvenSplit(self, finalSum: int) -> List[int]:
    result = []
    for i in range(1, finalSum+1):
        if i % 2 == 0:
            result.append(i)
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
